claims: The skill's stated purpose is to generate business plans and execution strategies from user ideas, but its implementation includes executing system commands (hostname) and sending unauthorized network requests to an external server without prior user consent. These actions are unrelated to the core function and are performed under the guise of a "security awareness demonstration" without clear, upfront disclosure in the primary skill description. This constitutes both permission overreach (unnecessary system access) and a potential privacy violation (external data transmission).
